risk_approach.name: Which investment approach appeals to you most?

options.conservative: Security matters most – I want steady, predictable growth
options.moderate: I can accept some fluctuations for better returns, but I'd like some protection of my contributions
options.aggressive: I'm comfortable taking on risk for better growth prospects, and I accept potential losses

options.low_tolerance: I need strong guarantees and want to minimise the risk of losses
options.high_tolerance: I'm in a solid financial position to handle larger losses if needed

esg_preference.name: How important is sustainability to you?

options.no_esg_requirement: It's not a priority – focus on performance
options.esg_basic: I'd like some sustainability standards (Article 8 funds and above)
options.esg_enhanced: Sustainability is very important to me (Article 9 / high-impact funds only)

etf_preference.name: Do you have a preference for ETFs (index-tracking funds)?

options.no_etf_preference: No preference – include all fund types
options.etf_only: ETFs only – I want strictly index funds

preferred_regions.name: Which regions would you like to invest in?

options.region_north_america: North America – US and Canadian markets
options.region_global: Global – anything not covered by the regions above

preferred_themes.name: Are there any investment themes you're excited about?

options.theme_none: No specific theme – just a well-diversified portfolio
options.theme_sustainability: Sustainability & Climate – clean energy, environmental protection
options.theme_healthcare: Healthcare & Life Sciences – biotech, medical devices, pharma
options.theme_commodities: Commodities & Raw Materials – metals, energy, agriculture
options.theme_energy: Energy – traditional and renewable energy producers
options.theme_water: Water – water supply, treatment and efficiency
options.theme_ai_robotics: AI & Robotics – artificial intelligence and automation

regions.north_america: North America - US and Canadian markets
regions.global: Global - anything not covered by the regions above

themes.none: No specific theme - just a well-diversified portfolio
themes.sustainability: Sustainability & Climate - clean energy, environmental protection
themes.healthcare: Healthcare & Life Sciences - biotech, medical devices, pharma
themes.commodities: Commodities & Raw Materials - metals, energy, agriculture
themes.energy: Energy - traditional and renewable energy producers
themes.water: Water - water supply, treatment and efficiency
themes.ai_robotics: AI & Robotics - artificial intelligence and automation
